reflection:
morning marko. yesterday you wrote "there is always this tension before i meet them," and then a few lines down, "my nerves are a bit lower now that i met everybody." that is the whole story in two sentences. the day before, your worry dump was brutal, that your friends are only around for the money, that you're alone, that ola is pretending well. then you actually sat with the support guys, taught them playwright, called it a pleasant meeting. the room never matched the 5am story. it almost never does.

look at the three day arc. anxiety went 5, then 7, then 3. the heart pounding in the morning went 7, then 8, then 4. both dropped the moment contact replaced anticipation. that's not luck, it's your nervous system showing you the dread is all front-loaded and the reality is kinder than the rehearsal in your head.

the speech is today. you practised it three times, you know it. one thing for before you go up: find one of those support guys and just talk to them for a minute first. contact is exactly what dissolved the tension yesterday, so use it on purpose today.

and gently, one more. you wrote that you're avoiding being honest with yourself, that you want to figure out your health and your relationship. you don't have to crack that open today. just notice you said it out loud. that's already the start. go connect, then go talk. you've got this. 💪
opener: the room never matched the 5am story, and it won't today either
focus_for_today: before the speech, talk to one of the support guys first. contact kills the tension
